extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked with 19km remaining on Col d'Èze, gained 50+ seconds at summit, won by 30 seconds on stage.
tactical_patterns: POWLESS bridged to break then attacked through, forcing UAE response earlier than ideal pacing would suggest.
GAUDU attempted bonus seconds at intermediate sprint but conceded net 2 seconds, tactical error expanding GC deficit.
YATES attacked same climb location as previous year's stage win, revealing predictable pattern UAE could anticipate.
GROßSCHARTNER paced before POGAČAR attack suggests UAE willing to burn domestique depth even when GC nearly secure.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: 50%+ season win rate before this race indicates form sustainability concerns for rivals are overblown
rider_signals.GAUDU David: negative: tactical miscalculation at intermediate sprint cost GC seconds, suggesting decision-making under pressure remains weak
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: attacked identical climb location as 2022 stage win, pattern recognition risk for future opponents
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: unable to limit losses below 43 seconds when GAUDU group cooperated, March form gap significant
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: positive: bridged and attacked through indicates Monaco-based course knowledge translated to tactical confidence
rider_signals.MÄDER Gino: positive: fifth place finish suggests early-season form trajectory stronger than typical for his calendar
